seo.title: Factions - Guide, Rewards, Quests & More - Marathon
seo.description: Discover all the factions in Marathon, their contracts, rewards and the means to get reputation with specific factions.

children.text: Factions in Marathon are essentially quest givers, which provide powerful rewards, credits, upgrades, and more. By completing contracts for a faction,
will be able to build up their reputation and unlock exclusive items, such as
Below you will find a breakdown of each faction, their progression system, rewards, and more!
Besides providing a vehicle for revealing
lore and worldbuilding, the Factions represent your overall macro progression.
This is because, while you can lose your loot during a run,
Faction progression maintains during a season
As you do missions for each Faction, you build up your reputation and unlock Upgrades that make your life easier and make you stronger over time.
For example, these include stat improvements, more inventory space, access to better purchases in your Armory and so on. You can even upgrade your
Every Faction provides many perks, but here are the general trends.
Improves your economy potential (credits, Vault space, Backpacks)
Unlocks more weapons and weapon mods in your Armory
Unlocks more explosives, traps, and implants in your Armory
Unlocks more weapons, weapon mods, and implants in your Armory
Unlocks more cores and implants in your Armory
Improves cooldowns for Prime and Tactical abilities
If you're a new player or coming back for a reset and not sure which Factions to prioritize first, consider the following sequencing:
to unlock the Priority Contracts for Factions and then focus on getting Increased Vault Space and Heat Capacity.
Go with NuCaloric if you'd prefer progress for defensive options like free daily
Go with Sekiguchi if you'd rather go toward improving your ability cooldowns and targeting specific cores.
Then, go to Arachne to get more out of your melee attacks.
After that, it's really up to your personal preferences. If you're interested in leveling up the
